data.content: Root cause: the Setlist screen fetched repo beat data under its own ["setlist-beats", repoPath] query key, but beat mutations only invalidate the shared ["beats", ...] namespace. That left Setlist rendering warm stale beat state after a ticket changed to abandoned even though abandoned was already treated as terminal in the chart helpers. Fix: Setlist now uses buildBeatsQueryKey("setlist", {}, repoScope) and fetchBeatsForScope so its repo beat list lives under the shared beat-query namespace and refetches immediately when beat updates invalidate active beat-list queries. Added a contract test to prevent the Setlist view from drifting back to a custom query key. Validation: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build all passed in worktree-foolery-f79a3-terminal-fix.
